project_type: React+Vite+Zustand frontend with Express+WebSocket+SQLite backend (board game)
build_system: Vite for frontend, tsx for server, npm for package management
test_framework: No test framework currently in the project
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compilation passes with no errors
environment_constraints: No test runner installed. Verification is via TypeScript compilation (npm run build).
key_patterns: Zustand store (src/store/gameStore.ts) manages all game and UI state. WebSocket messages are JSON with a 'type' field. Server broadcasts LOBBY_STATE to all lobby players when state changes. CLANS array in src/types/game.ts defines all 8 clans with id/name/color/initialHonor. ClanShield component renders clan seal images at a given size. DeckConfig interface defines deck/monster/kami configuration. i18n via src/i18n/ with en.ts and es.ts translation files.
directory_structure: src/components/ - React components, src/store/ - Zustand store, src/server/ - Express+WS server, src/types/ - TypeScript types and game constants, src/i18n/ - translations, src/img/ - clan seal images, src/utils/ - game logic
